first_run.rationale: The score is unchanged, and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively identical. Both versions focus on the same core issues: a severe lack of the required C++ experience on Windows and the absence of specific domain expertise in finance. The minor differences in wording and the slightly different framing of strengths and concerns are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and are not connected to the change in location from Germany to Romania.
